Art: Visual assets including models, textures, and animations.
Art/Player: Assets related to the player character.
Art/Enemy/BulkBot: Visual assets for the BulkBot enemy.
Art/Enemy/ShadowBot: Visual assets for the ShadowBot enemy.
Art/Environment/Structures: Environmental structures like walls and gates.
Art/Environment/Interactables: Interactive items within the game environment.
Audio: Music, sound effects, and audio mixing configurations.
Audio/SFX: Sound effects for interactions, environment, and combat.
Scripts: Game logic, systems, and scripted interactions.
Scripts/Core: Core game management and input handling.
Scripts/Systems/SaveLoad: Save and load game state logic.
Scripts/Enemy/BulkBot: Behavior and systems for BulkBot enemy.
Scripts/Enemy/ShadowBot: Behavior and systems for ShadowBot enemy.
Scripts/Collectables/Coins: Logic for coin collection and behavior.
Scripts/Collectables/Keys: Logic for key collection and usage.
Scenes: Main scene and level-specific Unity scenes.
ScriptableObjects: Configurable data assets for game components.
DevTools: Development tools for testing and debugging.
